chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْوُقُوفِ بِعَرَفَةَ وَ حَدِّ الْمَوْقِفِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 165 – The pausing at Arafaat and the boundary of the Pausing Station (Al Mowqif)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/121)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/121)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي الْمَوْقِفِ ارْتَفِعُوا عَنْ بَطْنِ عُرَنَةَ وَ قَالَ أَصْحَابُ الْأَرَاكِ لَا حَجَّ لَهُمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said regarding the Pausing Station: ‘Arise from the middle of Urna’. And he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The companions of Arak, there is no Hajj for them’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, about al-Mawqaf (the station) has said, ‘You must come out of Batn ‘Urnah.’ He (the Messenger of Allah) said, ‘Hajj of the people of al-Arak is not valid.’” NOTE: (Ahadith 1-3 of this Chapter are best explained in the form of fatwa).
